hero.title: AL-Turath University Researcher Directory & Academic Profiles
hero.tagline: A public researcher directory for AL-Turath University — every faculty member has an indexed academic profile with publications, citations, and a one-click CV.

features.title: Everything a research office needs, in one place
features.subtitle: Three tools that make your faculty discoverable, citable, and easy to collaborate with.

directory.title: Public Researcher Directory
directory.body: Search and filter every AL-Turath scholar by college, department, research interest, or SDG. Bilingual (Arabic / English), fast, mobile-ready, and optimised for Google Scholar and Google search.

academic_profile.title: Academic Profile Pages
academic_profile.body: Every researcher gets a citable public profile — bio, interests, publications with DOIs, Scopus / WoS / OpenAlex metrics, SDG alignment, and social links. Indexed by Google as Person + ProfilePage structured data.

cv_generator.title: One-Click CV Generator
cv_generator.body: Print-ready, print-styled CVs generated from the same data researchers maintain for their profile. No templates, no separate upkeep — your directory and your CV stay in sync automatically.

featured.title: Featured researchers
featured.subtitle: Highest-impact scholars by Scopus h-index.
featured.publications_count: {count, plural, =0 {no publications} one {# publication} other {# publications}}

collaboration.title: Foster collaboration
collaboration.body: Connect researchers across colleges and disciplines for joint discovery.

excellence.title: Academic excellence
excellence.body: Showcase the scholarship that earns the University its global standing.

innovation.title: Research innovation
innovation.body: Surface emerging fields, open data, and tools that move research forward.

sdg.title: United Nations Sustainable Development Goals
sdg.subtitle: Tap a goal to discover the researchers contributing to it.

about.title: About RIS
about.lead: The AL-Turath University Research Information System — a public directory of faculty members, an official academic profile page for every researcher, and a one-click CV generator built on top of the same data.

directory.title: Researcher Directory
directory.body: A public, filterable directory of every faculty member, sortable by college, department, and research interest.

profile.title: Academic Profile
profile.body: Every researcher has a citable public profile with biography, publications, metrics, and academic accounts.

cv.title: CV Generator
cv.body: Print-ready CV export from the same profile data — no separate templates, no duplicate upkeep.

about.data_body: Publications and metrics are imported from official sources: Google Scholar CSV, ORCID OAuth, Scopus, Web of Science, and OpenAlex. Each researcher maintains their profile data; admins manage platform-wide settings.
about.contact_body: For questions about the platform or institutional needs, reach us at

contact.title: Contact us
contact.lead: We welcome questions about the directory, requests to onboard a researcher, or research partnerships.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.lead: RIS respects your privacy. This page explains what we collect, why, and what rights you have.

data_collected.title: What we collect
data_collected.body:
When you sign in with your institutional email, we store: name, email, university ID. When you fill your profile: bio, publications, interests. When you use the AI assistant: conversation text.

We do not collect payment or financial information.

how_used.title: How we use data
how_used.body:
• Display your public profile in the directory (if you opt in).
• Generate and export your CV.
• Improve the platform statistically (aggregated, non-identifying data).
• Respond to your inquiries if you contact us.

public_profiles.title: Public profiles
public_profiles.body: If you enable public visibility, your profile becomes publicly available and indexable by search engines. You can turn visibility off at any time from Manage Profile.

third_parties.title: Third-party services
third_parties.body: We use: Google OAuth for sign-in, Supabase for hosting, Scopus / ORCID / OpenAlex for publication data, DeepSeek for the AI assistant. Each service is subject to its own privacy policy.

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.body: We use strictly necessary cookies for authentication sessions. No tracking, analytics, or advertising cookies.

retention.title: Data retention
retention.body: Profile data is kept while you are a member. On account deletion, we erase all personal data within 30 days — except for publications publicly indexed by external sources.

rights.title: Your rights
rights.body:
• Request a copy of your data.
• Correct inaccuracies.
• Delete your account and data.
• Pause or permanently hide your public profile.

contact.title: Privacy contact
contact.body: For any data-related question or request, email: research@uoturath.edu.iq

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.lead: By using RIS you agree to these terms.

acceptance.title: Acceptance
acceptance.body: Accessing or using the platform means you accept these terms and the privacy policy. If you disagree, do not use the platform.

use.title: Permitted use
use.body: The platform is intended to serve the academic community of AL-Turath University. Public browsing, search, and personal CV export are permitted.

accounts.title: Accounts
accounts.body: You need an @uoturath.edu.iq institutional email to create an account. You are responsible for account security. Notify us immediately if you detect unauthorised use.

content.title: Researcher content
content.body: You are responsible for the accuracy of data you enter in your profile. You grant the university the right to display your data publicly when you enable visibility.

intellectual_property.title: Intellectual property
intellectual_property.body: The platform source code is owned by its original developer Haydar AL-IESSA — all rights reserved. Copying or redistribution is prohibited without written permission. See the LICENSE file in the repository for the full terms.

prohibited.title: Prohibited uses
prohibited.body:
• Impersonating another researcher.
• Attempts to breach or disrupt the platform.
• Posting abusive or unlawful content.
• Commercial use without written permission.

availability.title: Availability & changes
availability.body: We may modify or suspend any part of the service without prior notice, particularly for maintenance or development.

changes.title: Changes to these terms
changes.body: We may update these terms from time to time. Continued use after changes means you accept the updated terms.

law.title: Governing law
law.body: These terms are governed by Iraqi law. Any dispute is referred to the competent Iraqi courts in Baghdad.

push.banner_body: Get instant notifications for new research, announcements, and updates from AL-Turath University.
push.denied: Notifications are blocked in your browser. Unblock them in site settings and try again.
push.enable_failed: Could not enable notifications. Please try again.

coming_soon.body: Our AI research assistant will help you find the right researcher by field or topic in one message. Check back shortly.

page.title: AI Research Assistant
page.subtitle: Ask about AL-Turath researchers and the directory. Your conversations are saved.
page.unavailable_body: An administrator will enable it shortly. Please check back later.

lead.heading: Before we start — tell us a bit about you
lead.body: Your name and one contact (email or phone) help us follow up if useful.
lead.disclaimer: We only use this to respond to your inquiry. We do not share it.

footer.brand_pitch: The official researcher directory of AL-Turath University — academic profiles, publication tracking, and one-click CV, all in one place.

profile.contact_hidden: Contact details are private. Sign in to request via the platform.

chat_page.privacy_note: Messages are retained to improve the assistant. Remind users not to share sensitive data.

import.title: Import publications
import.subtitle: Three providers, one merger. Conflicts resolve by DOI first, then fuzzy title.

scholar.title: Google Scholar
scholar.intro: The fastest path is to export a CSV from your Scholar profile — no scripts, no extensions, no scraping.

bookmarklet_warning.title: Do NOT use the console script as a bookmarklet
bookmarklet_warning.body: Google Scholar's CSP silently blocks javascript: bookmarklets, and React blocks them on this page as an XSS precaution. Use the CSV upload above — or, if you must, paste the script in DevTools Console while on scholar.google.com.

open_profile.title: Open your Scholar profile
open_profile.intro: Enter your Scholar user ID (from scholar.google.com/citations?user=...) to open your profile in a new tab, or leave empty to open Scholar home.

csv.title: Upload CSV exported from Scholar
csv.intro: Google Scholar lets you export your publications as CSV directly. This is the easiest, most reliable method.
csv.step_1: Open your Scholar profile and click SHOW MORE at the bottom until every publication is loaded.
csv.step_2: Tick the box in the column header to select all publications.
csv.step_3: Click EXPORT → CSV. A citations.csv file downloads.

extension.title: Browser extension (recommended)
extension.step_1: Download and unzip the RIS Scholar Importer extension.
extension.step_2: Visit chrome://extensions, enable Developer mode, click "Load unpacked", and select the unzipped folder.
extension.step_3: Open your Google Scholar profile, then click the RIS extension icon in the toolbar.
extension.step_4: Save the .mrhenc file the extension downloads, then upload it here.

console.title: Console script (fallback)
console.intro: Use this if you can't install the extension. The script must run in DevTools Console on scholar.google.com — not as a bookmarklet and not on this page.
console.step_1: In a new tab, open your Google Scholar profile (scholar.google.com/citations?user=...). Click "SHOW MORE" at the bottom until it's disabled so all publications are loaded.
console.step_2: Press F12 to open DevTools, then switch to the Console tab.
console.step_3: If Chrome warns "Don't paste code…", type
console.step_3_suffix: and press Enter to unlock pasting.
console.step_4: Paste the snippet below and press Enter. A .mrhenc file downloads automatically.

upload.title: Upload .mrhenc file
upload.drop: Drop the .mrhenc file here, or click to choose.
upload.error_empty: The file parsed but contained no usable rows.
upload.error_version: This .mrhenc was produced by an outdated extension. Please update.

orcid.title: ORCID
orcid.intro: Connect your ORCID account to pull works directly.
orcid.not_configured: ORCID isn't configured on this server (missing ORCID_CLIENT_ID).

scopus.title: Scopus
scopus.intro: Provide your Scopus Author ID to import indexed publications.
scopus.not_configured: Scopus isn't configured on this server (missing SCOPUS_API_KEY).
